blended.narrative: Welch Village is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 218 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 26°F, winds around 21 mph. Expect powder.
Wednesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
